subcodes.first_line: O thou who supplicatest unto God! Raise thou the hands of poverty and need to the threshold of the Lord, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متضرع الی الله دست عجز و نیاز بدرگاه حضرت پروردگار بنده نواز برافراز و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for protection, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
